reasoning_chain: Double yellow center line and white edge lines indicate a two-lane road with traffic driving on the left, consistent with South African road standards.
Reddish-brown soil along the roadside is characteristic of laterite soils found in many parts of South Africa, especially in savanna regions.
Vegetation includes acacia-like trees and flowering shrubs typical of the Highveld or bushveld biome, common in central and eastern South Africa.
